one_liner: DataForSEO offers a broad self-serve REST API suite for SEO, SERP, keyword, backlink, and business data with Basic Auth and an official MCP server for AI agent integration.

auth_methods.notes: Login (email) and auto-generated API password combined as login:password and Base64-encoded, passed in the Authorization header. No OAuth flow; credentials cannot be passed as URL params.

self_serve_notes: Free self-serve registration grants API login/password immediately via dashboard API Access tab. No recurring subscription; pay-as-you-go with $1 trial credit on signup and a $50 minimum top-up for continued usage. Sandbox available for testing at higher volumes.

api_surface.notes: Wide range of REST APIs covering SERP, Keyword Data, Domain Analytics, On-Page, Labs, Business Data, Merchant, Backlinks, App Data, Content Analysis, AI Optimization.

evidence.supports: Details Basic Authentication scheme using Base64-encoded login:password in Authorization header, and self-serve credential retrieval from dashboard.
Explains free account registration, $1 trial credit, and API password/Basic Auth setup process.
Describes self-serve free trial credit and pay-as-you-go model.
Broad REST API surface across multiple SEO/data verticals.
